group_sets.label: Official Regions
group_sets.description: Declared wards grouped by the ONS English region of their local authority.

group_sets.label: North / Midlands / South / London
group_sets.description: Declared wards grouped into broad English blocs derived from official regions.

group_sets.label: Settlement Extremes
group_sets.description: Declared wards split by nearby ward-centroid density within 15 km; bottom fifth is Rural / Sparse and top fifth is Urban / Dense.

group_sets.label: City Regions
group_sets.description: Declared wards grouped into the NHS map's English city catchments.
